Interface Operator

All Superinterfaces:
Named, SyntaxElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
IObserverFunction, IProgramMethod, IProgramVariable, OperatorSV, ParsableVariable, ProgramConstruct, QuantifiableVariable, SchemaVariable, SortedOperator, TermTransformer, UpdateableOperator
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractOperator, AbstractSortedOperator, AbstractTermTransformer, AddCast, ArrayBaseInstanceOf, ConstantValue, CreateBeforeLoopUpdate, CreateFrameCond, CreateHeapAnonUpdate, CreateLocalAnonUpdate, CreateWellformedCond, DivideLCRMonomials, DivideMonomials, ElementaryUpdate, EnumConstantValue, Equality, ExpandQueriesMetaConstruct, FormulaSV, Function, IfExThenElse, IfThenElse, IntroAtPreDefsOp, JAbstractSortedOperator, JFunction, JModality, JOperatorSV, Junctor, LocationVariable, LogicVariable, MemberPVToField, MetaAdd, MetaArithBitMaskOp, MetaBinaryAnd, MetaBinaryOr, MetaBinaryXOr, MetaDiv, MetaEqual, MetaGeq, MetaGreater, MetaLeq, MetaLess, MetaMul, MetaPow, MetaShift, MetaShiftLeft, MetaShiftRight, MetaSub, Metavariable, Modality, ModalOperatorSV, ObserverEqualityMetaConstruct, ObserverFunction, ParametricFunctionInstance, ProgramConstant, ProgramMethod, ProgramSV, ProgramVariable, Quantifier, SkolemTermSV, SortDependingFunction, SubstOp, TermLabelSV, TermSV, Transformer, UpdateApplication, UpdateJunctor, UpdateSV, VariableSV, WarySubstOp
public interface Operator extends Named, SyntaxElement

    Sort
    sort(Sort[] sorts)
    Determines the sort of the Term if it would be created using this Operator as top level operator and sub terms of sorts sorts.
    <T extends Term>
    void
    validTopLevelException(T term)
    Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator.

    Methods inherited from interface Named

    name

    Methods inherited from interface SyntaxElement

    getChild, getChildCount, getCursor

  • Method Details

    • arity

      int arity()
      the arity of this operator

    • sort

      Sort sort(Sort[] sorts)
      Determines the sort of the Term if it would be created using this Operator as top level operator and sub terms of sorts sorts. The assumption that the constructed term would be allowed is not checked.
      Parameters:
      sorts - an array of Sort containing the sort of the subterms of a (potential) term with this operator as top level operator
      Returns:
      sort of the term with this operator as top level operator of the given substerms

    • bindVarsAt

      boolean bindVarsAt(int n)
      Tells whether the operator binds variables at the n-th subterm.

    • modifier

      Modifier modifier()

    • hasModifier

      default boolean hasModifier(Modifier mod)

    • isRigid

      boolean isRigid()
      Tells whether the operator is rigid.

    • validTopLevelException

      <T extends Term> void validTopLevelException(T term) throws TermCreationException
      Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
      Throws:
      TermCreationException - if a construction error was recognised
